faqs.a: Yes, we provide on-site repair services for businesses and homes.

faqs.q: How long does a typical repair take?
faqs.a: Most repairs are completed within 24 hours. Complex issues may require additional time.

faqs.q: Can you help with data backup?
faqs.a: Absolutely, we can assist in setting up and performing regular backups to prevent data loss.
Yes, we offer remote support for software issues and troubleshooting.
